title: Remastered Wither
body:
# Wither Remastered: A Resource Pack for Minecraft

## Features
- Bright, glowing Wither Heads
- Energy Cracks, which are glowing lines that indicate unstable energy
- Elements of the Rage Theme (hints of chaos and corruption)
- A vanilla-style resource pack that fits in with the Minecraft Art Style

>Vanilla... but better.

This resource pack was created for the Wither Remastered datapack; however it can be used alone.

* Will work in any world
* Enhances every Wither battle
* Visual only; no change to gameplay.

## Installation Instructions
1. Download the resource pack
2. Open Minecraft
3. Go to Options > Resource Packs
4. Click Open Pack Folder
5. Move the pack into the folder
6. Enable it in-game

## Recommended Setup
To ensure maximum enjoyment:

* Use with the [Wither Boss Fight Remastered](https://modrinth.com/datapack/wither-boss-fight-remastered)
* Enable particles in Video Settings > All
* Play with sound on

## Frequently Asked Questions
Q: Do I need Optifine to use this?
A: No, it works with vanilla Minecraft.

Q: Will this cause changes to other mobs or creatures?
A: No, only the Wither will be changed.

Q: Is this resource pack compatible with multiplayer?
A: Yes, it works on the client's side.
